archetypes.name: The Blazer
archetypes.description: Opens hot, fast, and protective; challenges trust and demands immediate action.

archetypes.name: The Dealer
archetypes.description: Shifts to conditional bargaining for outcomes, concessions, and timeline guarantees.

archetypes.name: Legacy Parent
archetypes.description: Potential ending state where concern remains but trust is partially restored through respectful follow-through.
